Investigating Physiological Changes In Humans Induced By Fasting and Refeeding (FastForward Study)

Megat Nabil Jamaludin bin Megat Faizal

2026-02-02

  • 0) Cohort description
  • 1) Descriptive Trajectories: Response to Overall Intervention
  • 2) Fasting Intervention
  • 3) Refeeding Intervention
  • 4) Heterogeneity and bidirectionality of circulating immune cells
  • 5) Average Phase Shift
  • 6) Duration dependence
  • 7) ANCOVA Additive Heatmap
  • 8) ANCOVA Interaction Heatmap
  • 12) Immune-inflammatory indices graph
  • 13) Immune indices diet heterogeneity
  • 14) Baseline Inflammation and metabolic health
  • 15) CRP (T0->T1)
  • 16) TG/HDL (T0->T1)
  • 17) Residuals and QQ plotsfor main ANCOVA models
  • 18) Cook’s distance and refitting
  • 19) VIF ANCOVA tests
  • 20) Coefficient of variation

0) Cohort description

## =========================================================
## TABLE 1. Cohort description
## Main table only: age, sex, BMI, BMI category,
## fasting duration, refeeding duration, diet group
## =========================================================

# one row per subject
cohort_df <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  group_by(study_id) %>%
  summarise(
    age = first_non_na(age),
    sex = first_non_na(as.character(sex)),
    BMI_baseline = first_non_na(BMI_baseline),
    fasting_duration_measured = first_non_na(fasting_duration_measured),
    FR_duration = first_non_na(FR_duration),
    diet_keto = first_non_na(as.character(diet_keto)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("F", "M")),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto", "Keto")),
    BMI_cat = factor(
      make_bmi_cat(BMI_baseline),
      levels = c("Normal", "Overweight", "Obese")
    )
  )

# helpers
fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  ifelse(is.na(x), NA_character_, format(round(x, digits), nsmall = digits))
}

fmt_mean_sd <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste0(fmt_num(mean(x), digits), " ± ", fmt_num(sd(x), digits))
}

fmt_median_iqr <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  q <- quantile(x, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
  paste0(
    fmt_num(q[2], digits),
    " [", fmt_num(q[1], digits), ", ", fmt_num(q[3], digits), "]"
  )
}

fmt_n_pct <- function(n, denom, digits = 1) {
  if (is.na(denom) || denom == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste0(n, " (", fmt_num(100 * n / denom, digits), "%)")
}

# denominators
# basically to make sure you dont account for missing subjects
n_total <- nrow(cohort_df)
n_diet_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(cohort_df$diet_keto))
n_bmi_nonmiss <- sum(!is.na(cohort_df$BMI_cat))

# final table
table1_cohort <- tibble(
  Characteristic = c(
    "Number of subjects",
    "Age (years), mean ± SD",
    "Age (years), median [IQR]",
    "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), mean ± SD",
    "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), median [IQR]",
    "BMI category: Normal, n (%)",
    "BMI category: Overweight, n (%)",
    "BMI category: Obese, n (%)",
    "Fasting duration (days), mean ± SD",
    "Fasting duration (days), median [IQR]",
    "Refeeding duration (days), mean ± SD",
    "Refeeding duration (days), median [IQR]",
    "Female, n (%)",
    "Male, n (%)",
    "Diet: Non-Keto, n (%)",
    "Diet: Keto, n (%)"
  ),
  `Total cohort` = c(
    n_total,
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$age, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$age, 1),
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$BMI_baseline, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$BMI_baseline, 1),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$BMI_cat == "Normal", na.rm = TRUE), n_bmi_nonmiss),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$BMI_cat == "Overweight", na.rm = TRUE), n_bmi_nonmiss),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$BMI_cat == "Obese", na.rm = TRUE), n_bmi_nonmiss),
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$fasting_duration_measured, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$fasting_duration_measured, 1),
    fmt_mean_sd(cohort_df$FR_duration, 1),
    fmt_median_iqr(cohort_df$FR_duration, 1),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$sex == "F", na.rm = TRUE), n_total),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$sex == "M", na.rm = TRUE), n_total),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$diet_keto == "Non-Keto", na.rm = TRUE), n_diet_nonmiss),
    fmt_n_pct(sum(cohort_df$diet_keto == "Keto", na.rm = TRUE), n_diet_nonmiss)
  )
)

table1_cohort %>%
  knitr::kable(
    caption = "Table 1. Cohort characteristics.",
    col.names = c("Characteristic", "Total cohort"),
    align = c("l", "l")
  ) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
Table 1. Cohort characteristics.
Characteristic Total cohort

Age (years), mean ± SD 56.5 ± 34.6
Age (years), median [IQR] 57.2 [49.5, 61.7]
Baseline BMI (kg/m²), mean ± SD 27.7 ± 5.4
Baseline BMI (kg/m²), median [IQR] 27.0 [24.1, 30.6]
BMI category: Normal, n (%) 89 (32.4%)
BMI category: Overweight, n (%) 107 (38.9%)
BMI category: Obese, n (%) 79 (28.7%)
Fasting duration (days), mean ± SD 9.8 ± 4.3
Fasting duration (days), median [IQR] 9.0 [7.0, 11.0]
Refeeding duration (days), mean ± SD 2.8 ± 1.6
Refeeding duration (days), median [IQR] 3.0 [2.0, 3.0]
Female, n (%) 170 (60.7%)
Male, n (%) 110 (39.3%)
Diet: Non-Keto, n (%) 206 (76.6%)
Diet: Keto, n (%) 63 (23.4%) 
# optional save
dir.create("ModelTables", showWarnings = FALSE)
readr::write_csv(table1_cohort, "ModelTables/Table1_cohort_description.csv")

1) Descriptive Trajectories: Response to Overall Intervention

## =========================
## summary boxplots + median lines for all stratification (distribution) as well as whole pop
## 
## @vivi just to see the changes induced by the intervention, what rebounds, decrease or increases
## significance will be tested later of course
## now we just look at the data at face value and compare with basic biology
## =========================
markers_to_plot <- c(
  immune_absolute_vars,
  immune_percentage_vars,
  inflammatory_vars,
  lipid_vars,
  metabolic_vars,
  hematology_vars
) %>%
  strip_dagger() %>%
  unique()

markers_to_plot <- intersect(markers_to_plot, unique(FF_laboratory_master$variable))

log1p_markers <- c(
  immune_absolute_vars,
  inflammatory_vars
) %>%
  strip_dagger() %>%
  unique()

plot_marker_box_medians <- function(
  data,
  marker,
  use_log1p = FALSE,
  cap_quantiles = c(0.01, 0.99)
) {
  df <- data %>%
    filter(variable == marker, timepoint %in% c("T0", "T1", "T2"), !is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(
      timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T0", "T1", "T2")),
      BMI_cat = factor(
        make_bmi_cat(BMI_baseline),
        levels = c("Normal", "Overweight", "Obese")
      )
    )

  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)

  # cap per marker
  lo <- quantile(df$value, cap_quantiles[1], na.rm = TRUE)
  hi <- quantile(df$value, cap_quantiles[2], na.rm = TRUE)

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      value_cap = pmin(pmax(value, lo), hi),
      value_plot = if (use_log1p) log1p(value_cap) else value_cap
    )

  # medians on plotted scale
  med_all <- df %>%
    group_by(timepoint) %>%
    summarise(med = median(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(group = "All")

  med_bmi <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(BMI_cat)) %>%
    group_by(timepoint, BMI_cat) %>%
    summarise(med = median(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

  # means on capped original scale, then transformed for plotting
  mean_all <- df %>%
    group_by(timepoint) %>%
    summarise(mean_cap = mean(value_cap, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(mean_plot = if (use_log1p) log1p(mean_cap) else mean_cap)

  # n labels
  n_tp <- df %>%
    group_by(timepoint) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(lbl = paste0("n=", n))

  n_bmi <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(BMI_cat)) %>%
    group_by(timepoint, BMI_cat) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(lbl = paste0("n=", n))

  y_top <- max(df$value_plot, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_range <- diff(range(df$value_plot, na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(y_range) || y_range == 0) y_range <- 1

  n_tp <- n_tp %>%
  mutate(y = y_top + 0.04 * y_range)  # was 0.10 or 0.15

  bmi_levels <- levels(df$BMI_cat)
  n_bmi <- n_bmi %>%
    mutate(
      bmi_i = match(BMI_cat, bmi_levels),
      y = y_top - (bmi_i - 1) * 0.06 * y_range
    )

  ggplot(df, aes(x = timepoint, y = value_plot)) +
    geom_boxplot(
      outlier.shape = NA,
      width = 0.6,
      alpha = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = med_all,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med, group = group),
      linewidth = 1.2,
      alpha = 1.0,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = med_all,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med),
      size = 2.4,
      alpha = 1.0,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = mean_all,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = mean_plot),
      shape = 18,
      size = 2.8,
      color = "red",
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = med_bmi,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med, group = BMI_cat, linetype = BMI_cat),
      linewidth = 0.9,
      alpha = 0.45,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = med_bmi,
      aes(x = timepoint, y = med, group = BMI_cat),
      size = 1.6,
      alpha = 0.45,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_text(
  data = n_tp,
  aes(x = timepoint, y = y, label = lbl),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 3,
  fontface = "bold",
  hjust = -0.2,
  nudge_x = 0.1
) +
geom_text(
  data = n_bmi,
  aes(x = timepoint, y = y, label = paste0(BMI_cat, ": ", lbl)),
  inherit.aes = FALSE,
  size = 2.5,
  alpha = 0.75,
  hjust = -0.1,
  nudge_x = 0.1
) +
    labs(
      title = marker,
      x = "Timepoint",
      y = if (use_log1p) "Value (log1p; Winsorised 1st–99th pct)" else "Value (Winsorised 1st–99th pct)",
      linetype = "BMI category"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    )
}

dir.create("MarkerPlots_Medians", showWarnings = FALSE)

plots_out <- vector("list", length(markers_to_plot))
names(plots_out) <- markers_to_plot

for (m in markers_to_plot) {
  p <- plot_marker_box_medians(
    FF_laboratory_master,
    marker = m,
    use_log1p = m %in% log1p_markers
  )

  plots_out[[m]] <- p

  if (!is.null(p)) {
    safe_name <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", m)
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path("MarkerPlots_Medians", paste0("Marker_", safe_name, ".png")),
      plot = p,
      width = 7,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
  }
}

2) Fasting Intervention

## =====================================================================
## FASTING ANALYSES (T0 vs T1) - CLEAN TEMPLATE
## - same marker universe + ratio exclusions
## - log-transform selected markers BEFORE modeling (applies to T0 & T1)
## - centers continuous covariates within each marker sample (ALL models)
## - prints LME (timepoint shift), LME (timepoint x fasting duration),
##   ANCOVA (T1 ~ T0 + covariates), ANCOVA + BMI interaction, ANCOVA + Fast interaction
## - FDR computed within each term across markers
## =====================================================================
min_n <- 20

## -------------------------
## 0) Marker lists + log list
## -------------------------
markers_fasting <- markers_lm %>%
  setdiff(c("TG/HDL Ratio", "LDL/HDL Ratio (ratio)"))

markers_log <- c(
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

safe_log <- function(x) ifelse(!is.na(x) & x > 0, log(x), NA_real_)

center_in_sample <- function(x) x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)

fmt_ci <- function(lo, hi, digits = 3) {
  ifelse(is.na(lo) | is.na(hi), NA_character_,
         paste0("[", round(lo, digits), ", ", round(hi, digits), "]"))
}

## -------------------------
## 1) Term sets (expected)
## -------------------------
terms_lme_time <- c("(Intercept)", "timepointT1", "age_c", "sexM", "BMI_c")

terms_lme_fast <- c(
  "(Intercept)",
  "timepointT1",
  "fast_c",
  "timepointT1:fast_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM",
  "BMI_c"
)

terms_ancova_main <- c("T0_c", "fast_c", "BMI_c", "age_c", "sexM")

terms_ancova_BMIint <- c("T0_c", "BMI_c", "T0_c:BMI_c", "fast_c", "age_c", "sexM")

terms_ancova_FASTint <- c("T0_c", "fast_c", "T0_c:fast_c", "BMI_c", "age_c", "sexM")

## -------------------------
## 2) Pretty term names + ordering
## -------------------------
term_pretty_fasting <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)"      ~ "Intercept",
    term == "timepointT1"      ~ "Timepoint: T1 vs T0",
    term == "fast_c"           ~ "Fasting duration (days), centered",
    term == "timepointT1:fast_c" ~ "Timepoint × fasting duration (Δ per day)",
    term == "T0_c"             ~ "Baseline (T0), centered",
    term == "BMI_c"            ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    term == "age_c"            ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"             ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "T0_c:BMI_c"       ~ "T0 × BMI (baseline dependency differs by BMI)",
    term == "T0_c:fast_c"      ~ "T0 × fasting duration (baseline dependency differs by duration)",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_fasting <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term %in% c("timepointT1:fast_c") ~ 1L,
    term %in% c("timepointT1")        ~ 2L,
    term %in% c("T0_c:BMI_c", "T0_c:fast_c") ~ 3L,
    term %in% c("T0_c")               ~ 4L,
    term %in% c("fast_c")             ~ 5L,
    term %in% c("BMI_c")              ~ 6L,
    term %in% c("age_c")              ~ 7L,
    term %in% c("sexM")               ~ 8L,
    term == "(Intercept)"             ~ 9L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

## -------------------------
## 3) Build ONE clean long dataset (T0/T1)
## -------------------------
fasting_long <- FF_laboratory_master %>%
  filter(
    variable %in% markers_fasting,
    timepoint %in% c("T0","T1"),
    !is.na(value)
  ) %>%
  group_by(study_id, variable, timepoint) %>%
  slice_min(datetime, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T0","T1")),
    sex       = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M")),

    age  = readr::parse_number(as.character(age)),
    BMI_baseline = readr::parse_number(as.character(BMI_baseline)),
    fasting_duration_measured = readr::parse_number(as.character(fasting_duration_measured)),

    value = ifelse(variable %in% markers_log, safe_log(value), value),

    Variable = ifelse(variable %in% markers_log, paste0(variable, "†"), variable)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))

## =====================================================================
## 4.1) Fasting average shift (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_time_tbl <- fasting_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>%
      drop_na(value, timepoint, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_time,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        age_c = center_in_sample(age),
        BMI_c = center_in_sample(BMI_baseline)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_time) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_time_table <- lme_time_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_time_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint + centered age + sex + centered BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
Fasting LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint + centered age + sex + centered BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.
Variable Term Estimate SE 95% CI P (raw) P (FDR) Signif. n (subjects)

Platelets (Tsd./µl)† Timepoint: T1 vs T0 -0.035 0.009 [-0.053, -0.017] 0.00020 0.00024 ☆☆☆ 275
Alkaline Phosphatase (U/l) Timepoint: T1 vs T0 -1.595 0.584 [-2.744, -0.445] 0.00673 0.00769 ☆☆ 275
Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)† Timepoint: T1 vs T0 -0.058 0.023 [-0.103, -0.012] 0.01374 0.01499 ☆ 275

dir.create("ModelTables", showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(lme_time_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_fasting_all_terms_T0T1.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.2) Fasting duration modulation (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint * fast_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_fastmod_tbl <- fasting_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>%
      drop_na(value, timepoint, fasting_duration_measured, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_fast,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        fast_c = center_in_sample(fasting_duration_measured),
        age_c  = center_in_sample(age),
        BMI_c  = center_in_sample(BMI_baseline)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint * fast_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_fast) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_fastmod_table <- lme_fastmod_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_fastmod_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint × centered fasting duration + centered age + sex + centered BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(lme_fastmod_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_fasting_timepointXfast_all_terms_T0T1.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.3) Fasting ANCOVA (main effects)
## Model: T1 ~ T0_c + fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex
## (centering is within marker sample; log already applied in fasting_long)
## =====================================================================

fasting_wide <- fasting_long %>%
  select(study_id, variable, Variable, timepoint, value, fasting_duration_measured, age, sex, BMI_baseline) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T0), !is.na(T1)) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(
    T0_c   = center_in_sample(T0),
    fast_c = center_in_sample(fasting_duration_measured),
    age_c  = center_in_sample(age),
    BMI_c  = center_in_sample(BMI_baseline)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_main_tbl <- fasting_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1, T0_c, fast_c, BMI_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_main,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T1 ~ T0_c + fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_main) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_main_table <- ancova_main_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_main_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting ANCOVA (per marker): T1 adjusted for centered T0 + centered fasting duration + centered BMI + centered age + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
Fasting ANCOVA (per marker): T1 adjusted for centered T0 + centered fasting duration + centered BMI + centered age + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.

write_csv(ancova_main_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_fasting_ANCOVA_main_all_terms_T1onT0.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.4) Fasting ANCOVA + BMI interaction
## Model: T1 ~ T0_c * BMI_c + fast_c + age_c + sex
## =====================================================================

ancova_BMIint_tbl <- fasting_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1, T0_c, BMI_c, fast_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_BMIint,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T1 ~ T0_c * BMI_c + fast_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_BMIint) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_BMIint_table <- ancova_BMIint_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_BMIint_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting ANCOVA + BMI interaction (per marker): T1 ~ centered T0 × centered BMI + centered fasting duration + centered age + sex. FDR within term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(ancova_BMIint_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_fasting_ANCOVA_T0xBMI_all_terms_T1onT0.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 4.5) Fasting ANCOVA + fasting duration interaction
## Model: T1 ~ T0_c * fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex
## =====================================================================

ancova_FASTint_tbl <- fasting_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1, T0_c, fast_c, BMI_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_FASTint,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T1 ~ T0_c * fast_c + BMI_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_FASTint) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_FASTint_table <- ancova_FASTint_tbl %>%
  left_join(fasting_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_fasting(term),
    Term_order = term_order_fasting(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = fmt_ci(conf.low, conf.high, digits = 3),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_FASTint_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Fasting ANCOVA + fasting duration interaction (per marker): T1 ~ centered T0 × centered fasting duration + centered BMI + centered age + sex. FDR within term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(ancova_FASTint_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_fasting_ANCOVA_T0xFast_all_terms_T1onT0.csv"))

3) Refeeding Intervention

## =====================================================================
## REFEEDING ANALYSES (T1 vs T2) - FASTING-STYLE TEMPLATE (CLEAN)
## - same marker universe and ratio exclusions as fasting
## - log-transform selected markers BEFORE modeling (applies to T1 & T2)
## - centers continuous covariates within each marker sample
## - shows ALL fixed-effect terms (LMEs)
## - FDR computed within each term across markers
## =====================================================================

min_n <- 20

## -------------------------
## 0) Consistent marker lists
## -------------------------
# Same universe and ratio exclusions as fasting
markers_refeed <- markers_lm %>%
  setdiff(c("TG/HDL Ratio", "LDL/HDL Ratio (ratio)"))

# Same log group as fasting (you already validated positivity in audit)
markers_log <- c(
  "CRP (mg/l)",
  "Ferritin (µg/l)",
  "Triglycerides (mg/dl)",
  "Insulin (mIU/l)",
  "ESR (mm/h)",
  "GPT/ALT (U/l)",
  "GOT/AST (U/l)",
  "Neutrophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Lymphocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Monocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Eosinophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Basophils abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "Immature Granulocytes abs. (Tsd./µl)",
  "White Blood Cells (Tsd./µl)",
  "Platelets (Tsd./µl)"
)

safe_log <- function(x) if_else(!is.na(x) & x > 0, log(x), NA_real_)

## -------------------------
## 1) Term sets (expected)
## -------------------------
terms_lme_time <- c("(Intercept)", "timepointT2", "age_c", "sexM", "BMI_c")

terms_lme_fr <- c(
  "(Intercept)",
  "timepointT2",
  "FR_c",
  "timepointT2:FR_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM",
  "BMI_c"
)

terms_ancova <- c("T1_c", "diet_ketoKeto", "FR_c", "age_c", "sexM", "BMI_c")

## -------------------------
## 2) Pretty terms + ordering
## -------------------------
term_pretty_refeed <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "(Intercept)"        ~ "Intercept",
    term == "timepointT2"        ~ "Timepoint: T2 vs T1",
    term == "FR_c"               ~ "Refeeding duration (days), centered",
    term == "timepointT2:FR_c"   ~ "Timepoint × refeeding duration (Δ per day)",
    term == "T1_c"               ~ "End of fasting (T1), centered",
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"      ~ "Diet: Keto (vs Non-Keto)",
    term == "age_c"              ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"               ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "BMI_c"              ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_refeed <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "timepointT2:FR_c" ~ 1L,
    term == "timepointT2"      ~ 2L,
    term == "T1_c"             ~ 3L,
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"    ~ 4L,
    term == "FR_c"             ~ 5L,
    term == "BMI_c"            ~ 6L,
    term == "age_c"            ~ 7L,
    term == "sexM"             ~ 8L,
    term == "(Intercept)"      ~ 9L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

## -------------------------
## 3) Build ONE clean long dataset (T1/T2)
## -------------------------
refeed_long <- refeed_base %>%
  filter(
    variable %in% markers_refeed,
    timepoint %in% c("T1","T2"),
    !is.na(value)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = c("T1","T2")),
    sex       = factor(sex, levels = c("F","M")),
    diet_keto = factor(diet_keto, levels = c("Non-Keto","Keto")),  # ensures diet_ketoKeto exists

    age          = as.numeric(age),
    BMI_baseline = as.numeric(BMI_baseline),
    FR_duration  = as.numeric(FR_duration),

    # log BEFORE modeling (applies at both timepoints)
    value = if_else(variable %in% markers_log, safe_log(value), value),

    # dagger label for tables
    Variable = if_else(variable %in% markers_log, paste0(variable, "†"), variable)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value))  # drop NA created by safe_log (should be none per your audit)

## =====================================================================
## 8.1) Refeeding average shift (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_time_tbl <- refeed_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(value, timepoint, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_time,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    # center within marker sample
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
        BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1 | study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_time) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_time_table <- lme_time_tbl %>%
  left_join(refeed_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_time_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint + age + sex + BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

dir.create("ModelTables", showWarnings = FALSE)
write_csv(lme_time_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_refeed_all_terms_T1T2.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 8.2) Refeeding duration modulation (LME) - ALL TERMS
## Model: value ~ timepoint * FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1|study_id)
## =====================================================================

lme_frmod_tbl <- refeed_long %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(value, timepoint, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_lme_fr,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        FR_c  = FR_duration  - mean(FR_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
        age_c = age          - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
        BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
      )

    fit <- lmer(value ~ timepoint * FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c + (1 | study_id), data = df)

    broom.mixed::tidy(fit, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_lme_fr) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

lme_frmod_table <- lme_frmod_tbl %>%
  left_join(refeed_long %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

lme_frmod_table %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding LME (all fixed effects): value ~ timepoint * centered FR_duration + age + sex + BMI + (1|study_id). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(lme_frmod_table, file.path("ModelTables", "LME_refeed_timepointXFR_all_terms_T1T2.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 8.3) Refeeding ANCOVA (fasting-style)
## Model: T2 ~ T1_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c
## - log-transform is applied to BOTH T1 and T2 via refeed_long BEFORE widening
## - centers within marker sample
## - shows ALL terms in term_keep; FDR within term across markers
## =====================================================================

refeed_wide <- refeed_long %>%
  select(study_id, variable, Variable, timepoint, value, diet_keto, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T1), !is.na(T2)) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(
    T1_c  = T1 - mean(T1, na.rm = TRUE),
    FR_c  = FR_duration - mean(FR_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_tbl_refeed <- refeed_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1_c, T2, diet_keto, FR_c, age_c, sex, BMI_c)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed <- ancova_tbl_refeed %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA (per marker): T2 adjusted for centered T1 + diet + centered FR_duration (+ age, sex, BMI). FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
Refeeding ANCOVA (per marker): T2 adjusted for centered T1 + diet + centered FR_duration (+ age, sex, BMI). FDR computed within each term across markers.

write_csv(ancova_table_refeed, file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_centered_all_terms_T2onT1.csv"))

## =====================================================================
## 8.4) Refeeding ANCOVA + Keto interaction
## Model: T2 ~ T1_c * diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c
## Question: Does the T1→T2 relationship differ by Keto vs Non-Keto?
## (i.e., baseline dependency differs by diet group)
## =====================================================================

terms_ancova_keto_int <- c(
  "T1_c",
  "diet_ketoKeto",
  "T1_c:diet_ketoKeto",
  "FR_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM",
  "BMI_c"
)

term_pretty_refeed2 <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c"                 ~ "End of fasting (T1), centered",
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"        ~ "Diet: Keto (vs Non-Keto)",
    term == "T1_c:BMI_c"         ~ "T1 × BMI (baseline dependency differs by BMI)",
    term == "T1_c:diet_ketoKeto"   ~ "T1 × Diet (baseline dependency differs by diet)",
    term == "FR_c"                 ~ "Refeeding duration (days), centered",
    term == "age_c"                ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"                 ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "BMI_c"                ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    term == "(Intercept)"          ~ "Intercept",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_refeed2 <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c:diet_ketoKeto" ~ 1L,
    term == "T1_c:BMI_c"         ~ 1L,   # used in next model too
    term == "T1_c"               ~ 2L,
    term == "diet_ketoKeto"      ~ 3L,
    term == "BMI_c"              ~ 4L,
    term == "FR_c"               ~ 5L,
    term == "age_c"              ~ 6L,
    term == "sexM"               ~ 7L,
    term == "(Intercept)"        ~ 8L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

ancova_tbl_refeed_keto_int <- refeed_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1_c, T2, diet_keto, FR_c, age_c, sex, BMI_c)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_keto_int,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c * diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_keto_int) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed_keto_int <- ancova_tbl_refeed_keto_int %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed2(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed2(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed_keto_int %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA + diet interaction: T2 ~ T1_c * diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex + BMI_c. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")

write_csv(
  ancova_table_refeed_keto_int,
  file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_T2onT1_dietInteraction.csv")
)


## =====================================================================
## 8.5) Refeeding ANCOVA + BMI interaction
## Model: T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex
## Question: Does baseline dependency (T1→T2) differ by BMI?
## =====================================================================

terms_ancova_bmi_int <- c(
  "T1_c",
  "BMI_c",
  "T1_c:BMI_c",
  "diet_ketoKeto",
  "FR_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM"
)

ancova_tbl_refeed_bmi_int <- refeed_wide %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T1_c, T2, diet_keto, FR_c, age_c, sex, BMI_c)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = terms_ancova_bmi_int,
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% terms_ancova_bmi_int) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed_bmi_int <- ancova_tbl_refeed_bmi_int %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_refeed2(term),
    Term_order = term_order_refeed2(term),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed_bmi_int %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA + BMI interaction: T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
Refeeding ANCOVA + BMI interaction: T2 ~ T1_c * BMI_c + diet_keto + FR_c + age_c + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.

write_csv(
  ancova_table_refeed_bmi_int,
  file.path("ModelTables", "LM_refeed_ANCOVA_T2onT1_BMIInteraction.csv")
)

## =====================================================================
## 8.6) Refeeding ANCOVA + FR interaction (baseline dependency differs by refeeding duration)
## Model (per marker): T2 ~ T1_c * FR_c + diet_keto + BMI_c + age_c + sex
## - uses refeed_long (already log-transformed for markers_log) BEFORE widening
## - centers within marker sample
## - shows ALL terms; FDR computed within each term across markers
## =====================================================================

# --- terms expected in this model
terms_ancova_FRint <- c(
  "T1_c",
  "FR_c",
  "T1_c:FR_c",
  "diet_ketoKeto",
  "BMI_c",
  "age_c",
  "sexM"
)

# --- pretty names + ordering (add FR interaction)
term_pretty_ancova_FRint <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c"          ~ "End of fasting (T1), centered",
    term == "FR_c"          ~ "Refeeding duration (days), centered",
    term == "T1_c:FR_c"     ~ "T1 × refeeding duration (baseline dependency mod.)",
    term == "diet_ketoKeto" ~ "Diet: Keto (vs Non-Keto)",
    term == "BMI_c"         ~ "Baseline BMI (kg/m²), centered",
    term == "age_c"         ~ "Age (years), centered",
    term == "sexM"          ~ "Sex: Male (vs Female)",
    term == "(Intercept)"   ~ "Intercept",
    TRUE ~ term
  )
}

term_order_ancova_FRint <- function(term) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    term == "T1_c:FR_c"     ~ 1L,
    term == "T1_c"          ~ 2L,
    term == "FR_c"          ~ 3L,
    term == "diet_ketoKeto" ~ 4L,
    term == "BMI_c"         ~ 5L,
    term == "age_c"         ~ 6L,
    term == "sexM"          ~ 7L,
    term == "(Intercept)"   ~ 8L,
    TRUE ~ 99L
  )
}

# --- wide dataset from refeed_long (log already applied there)
refeed_wide_FRint <- refeed_long %>%
  select(study_id, variable, Variable, timepoint, value,
         diet_keto, FR_duration, age, sex, BMI_baseline) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = value) %>%
  filter(!is.na(T1), !is.na(T2)) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  mutate(
    T1_c  = T1 - mean(T1, na.rm = TRUE),
    FR_c  = FR_duration - mean(FR_duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    BMI_c = BMI_baseline - mean(BMI_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_tbl_refeed_FRint <- refeed_wide_FRint %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    df <- .x %>% drop_na(T2, T1_c, FR_c, diet_keto, BMI_c, age_c, sex)

    n_subj <- n_distinct(df$study_id)
    if (n_subj < min_n) {
      return(tibble(
        term = c("(Intercept)", terms_ancova_FRint),
        estimate = NA_real_, std.error = NA_real_,
        conf.low = NA_real_, conf.high = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n_subjects = n_subj
      ))
    }

    fit <- lm(T2 ~ T1_c * FR_c + diet_keto + BMI_c + age_c + sex, data = df)

    broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      filter(term %in% c("(Intercept)", terms_ancova_FRint)) %>%
      mutate(n_subjects = n_subj)
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(p_raw = p.value) %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_fdr = p.adjust(p_raw, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

ancova_table_refeed_FRint <- ancova_tbl_refeed_FRint %>%
  left_join(refeed_wide_FRint %>% distinct(variable, Variable), by = "variable") %>%
  mutate(
    Term = term_pretty_ancova_FRint(term),
    Term_order = term_order_ancova_FRint(term),

    Estimate = round(estimate, 3),
    SE = round(std.error, 3),
    `95% CI` = ifelse(
      is.na(conf.low) | is.na(conf.high),
      NA_character_,
      paste0("[", round(conf.low, 3), ", ", round(conf.high, 3), "]")
    ),
    `P (raw)` = fmt_p(p_raw),
    `P (FDR)` = fmt_p(p_fdr),
    `Signif.` = p_stars(p_fdr)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable, Term, Estimate, SE, `95% CI`,
    `P (raw)`, `P (FDR)`, `Signif.`,
    `n (subjects)` = n_subjects,
    Term_order, p_fdr
  ) %>%
  arrange(Term_order, is.na(p_fdr), p_fdr, Variable) %>%
  select(-Term_order, -p_fdr)

ancova_table_refeed_FRint %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Refeeding ANCOVA + FR interaction (per marker): T2 ~ T1_c * FR_c + diet + BMI + age + sex. FDR computed within each term across markers.",
    align = "l"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  footnote(general = "† Log-transformed prior to centering and modeling.") %>%
  scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "650px")
